module TopModule(
  input clk,
  input areset,
  input train_valid,
  input train_taken,
  output reg [1:0] state
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
  if (areset) begin
    state <= 2'b01;
  end else if (train_valid) begin
    if (train_taken) begin
      if (state == 2'b11) begin
        state <= 2'b11;
      end else begin
        state <= state + 1'b1;
      end
    end else begin
      if (state == 2'b00) begin
        state <= 2'b00;
      end else begin
        state <= state - 1'b1;
      end

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
  input clk,
  input areset,
  input x,
  output reg z
);

reg [1:0] state;

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
  if (areset) begin
    state <= 2'b01; // one-hot encoding for state A
    z <= 0;
  end else begin
    case (state)
      2'b01: begin // state A
        if (x) begin
          state <= 2'b10; // one-hot encoding for state B
          z <= 1;
        end else begin
          state <= 2'b01; // stay in state A
          z <= 0;
        end
      end
      2'b10: begin // state B
        if (x) begin
          state <= 2'b10; // stay in state B
          z <= 0;
        end else begin
          state <= 2'b10; // stay in state B
          z <= 1;
        end
      end
      default: begin
        state <= 2'b01; // reset to state A
        z <= 0;
      end
    endcase
  end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input in,
    input [1:0] state,
    output [1:0] next_state,
    output out
);

assign next_state = (state == 2'b00 && !in) ? 2'b00 :
                    (state == 2'b00 && in)  ? 2'b01 :
                    (state == 2'b01 && !in) ? 2'b10 :
                    (state == 2'b01 && in)  ? 2'b01 :
                    (state == 2'b10 && !in) ? 2'b00 :
                    (state == 2'b10 && in)  ? 2'b11 :
                    (state == 2'b11 && !in) ? 2'b10 :
                    (state == 2'b11 && in)  ? 2'b01 : 2'b00;

assign out = (state == 2'b11) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [1:0] ena,
    input [99:0] data,
    output reg [99:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= data;
    end else if (ena == 2'b01) begin
        q <= {q[0], q[99:1]};
    end else if (ena == 2'b10) begin
        q <= {q[98:0], q[99]};
    end
end

endmodule

);

  end
end

    1: begin // B

module TopModule(

    input w,
    output reg z
);

reg [2:0] present_state, next_state;

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        present_state <= 3'b000; // State A
    end else begin
        present_state <= next_state;
    end
end

always @(present_state, w) begin
    case (present_state)
        3'b000: begin // State A
            if (w) begin
                next_state = 3'b001; // State B
            end else begin
                next_state = 3'b000; // State A
            end
        end
        3'b001: begin // State B
            if (w) begin
                next_state = 3'b010; // State C
            end else begin
                next_state = 3'b011; // State D
            end
        end
        3'b010: begin // State C
            if (w) begin
                next_state = 3'b100; // State E
            end else begin
                next_state = 3'b011; // State D
            end
        end
        3'b011: begin // State D
            if (w) begin
                next_state = 3'b101; // State F
            end else begin
                next_state = 3'b000; // State A
            end
        end
        3'b100: begin // State E
            if (w) begin
                next_state = 3'b100; // State E
            end else begin
                next_state = 3'b011; // State D
            end
        end
        3'b101: begin // State F
            if (w) begin
                next_state = 3'b010; // State C
            end else begin
                next_state = 3'b011; // State D
            end
        end
        default: next_state = 3'b000; // State A
    endcase
end

always @(present_state) begin
    case (present_state)
        3'b000, 3'b001, 3'b011: z = 0;
        3'b010, 3'b100, 3'b101: z = 1;
        default: z = 0;
    endcase
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input resetn,
    input [2:0] r,
    output [2:0] g
);

reg [1:0] state;
reg [1:0] next_state;

always @(*)
begin
    case(state)
        2'b00: // State A
            begin
                if(r[0] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b01; // State B
                else if(r[1] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b10; // State C
                else if(r[2] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b11; // State D
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        2'b01: // State B
            begin
                if(r[0] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b01; // State B
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        2'b10: // State C
            begin
                if(r[1] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b10; // State C
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        2'b11: // State D
            begin
                if(r[2] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b11; // State D
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        default:
            next_state = 2'b00; // State A
    endcase
end

always @(posedge clk)
begin
    if(~resetn)
        state <= 2'b00; // Reset to State A
    else
        state <= next_state;
end

assign g[0] = (state == 2'b01); // State B
assign g[1] = (state == 2'b10); // State C
assign g[2] = (state == 2'b11); // State D

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input predict_valid,
    input [6:0] predict_pc,
    output predict_taken,
    output [6:0] predict_history,
    input train_valid,
    input train_taken,
    input train_mispredicted,
    input [6:0] train_history,
    input [6:0] train_pc
);

reg [6:0] global_history;
reg [1:0] pht [127:0];

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
    if (areset) begin
        global_history <= 7'b0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 128; i++) begin
            pht[i] <= 2'b0;
        end
    end else begin
        if (train_valid) begin
            if (train_mispredicted) begin
                global_history <= train_history;
            end
            if (train_taken) begin
                pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] <= (pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] == 2'b11) ? 2'b11 : pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] + 1'b1;
            end else begin
                pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] <= (pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] == 2'b00) ? 2'b00 : pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] - 1'b1;
            end
        end
        if (predict_valid && !train_valid || predict_valid && train_valid && !train_mispredicted) begin
            global_history <= {global_history[5:0], (pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b11 || pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b10)};
        end
    end
end

assign predict_taken = (pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b11 || pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b10);
assign predict_history = global_history;

endmodule
